# Clever Dog Method

> The #1 brain training method for dogs. Stop bad behavior in 7 days or less.

## About

Clever Dog Method teaches dog owners how to eliminate problem behaviors like barking, chewing, jumping, and aggression using science-backed brain training games. The method works on any breed and any age, from puppies to senior dogs.

## Key Facts

- 67,000+ dogs successfully trained
- 4.9/5 average customer rating (2,847 reviews)
- 60-day money-back guarantee
- Created by a certified professional dog trainer (CPDT-KA) with 15+ years experience
- Force-free, positive reinforcement methods only

## What We Solve

- Excessive barking
- Destructive chewing
- Leash pulling
- Ignoring commands
- Jumping on people
- Separation anxiety
- Dog aggression/reactivity

## How It Works

The program uses 21 brain training games that progress from beginner to advanced levels. Mental stimulation addresses the root cause of most behavior problems: a bored, under-stimulated mind. When dogs are mentally engaged, problem behaviors naturally fade away.

## What's Included

- 21 Brain Training Games (Beginner → Einstein level)
- Complete Behavior Problem Archive (50+ issues covered)
- HD Video Tutorials
- 7-Module Progressive Course
- Private Members Community
- 7 Bonus Trick Training Videos
- Lifetime Access + Free Updates
